heading: Art. 116. Riot or breach of peace
label: 916 Art. 116. Riot or breach of peace
text: Any person subject to this chapter who causes or participates in any riot or breach of the peace shall be punished as a court-martial may direct.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)91650:710.(Art. 116), .May 5, 1950, ch. 169, § 164 Stat. 139
